changes: Resolved an issue where the potency of Holy Spirit and Holy Circle did not increase when having one stack of Requiescat.
Resolved an issue where executing Wanderer's Minuet multiple times in quick succession prevented queuing another action.
Rough Divide: Increased damage and healing potency of the additional effect No Mercy from 10% to 20%.
Relentless Rush: Added additional effect 'reduces damage taken by 25%'.
Resolved issue where descriptions for actions after Junction Healer/Continuation incorrectly stated healing range as 15 yalms.
Resolved issue where the description of Terminal Trigger failed to note attack radius is 5 yalms.
Powerful Shot: Base potency increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Empyreal Arrow: Potency increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Drill: Potency increased from 9,000 to 10,000; potency under Analysis increased from 18,000 to 20,000.
Bioblaster: Damage over time duration increased from 9 to 12 seconds.
Chain Saw: Potency increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Resolved issue where the description of Bishop Autoturret incorrectly listed barrier potency.
Resolved issue where the description of Wildfire failed to note attack radius is 5 yalms.
Honing Dance: Added additional effect 'reduces damage taken by 20%'; resolved issue where description failed to note attack radius is 5 yalms.
Fan Dance: Potency increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Fire: Astral Fire II duration increased from 15 to 30s.
Blizzard: Umbral Ice II duration increased from 15 to 30s.
Burst: Potency and barrier potency increased from 12,000 to 16,000.
Paradox: Now a charged action with 2 maximum charges.
Night Wing: Half-asleep effect now reduces movement speed by 50%; duration for Sleep/Half-asleep reduced from 4 to 3s.
Fire IV/Blizzard IV/Freeze: Cast time reduced from 1.92 to 1.44s.
Fire IV: Astral Fire III duration increased from 15 to 30s.
Flare/Freeze: Damage to primary target increased from 8,000 to 12,000.
Blizzard IV: Umbral Ice III duration increased from 15 to 30s.
Soul Resonance: Grants Apocatastasis, reducing damage taken by 20% for 15s.
Slipstream: Potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000; Windstorm potency increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Radiant Aegis: Damage reduction increased from 10% to 20%; barrier potency increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Mountain Buster: Potency increased from 2,000 to 4,000.
Revelation: Potency increased from 3,000 to 6,000.
Corps-a-corps: Damage reduction changed from 20% to 10%.
Displacement: Resolved issue where it erroneously increased healing potency of Southern Cross.
Aspected Benefic: Base cure potency increased from 4,000 to 5,000; maximum cure potency reduced from 12,000 to 10,000.
Resolved description error for Primal Scream regarding Primal Rend and Chaotic Cyclone potency.
Resolved description error for Three Mudra regarding change to Meisui.
